title: HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK OFFICE HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eligibility determination for Medicaid and SNAP, licensing of adult foster care homes, private and pre-admission nursing home assessments, Senior Peer Mentoring, and health and wellness programs. 5010 E Third Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and people with physical disabilities age 18 and over Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 842-2770 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-2770 Toll-free (800) 584-9712 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation and signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Going north on Highway 101, turn right on McCormick Loop Road. At the end of the road, take a left on Third Street. One-story tan building on the right side, across from the Forestry Department. Going south on Highway 101, turn left at the stop light after the Tillamook Cheese Factory (Wilson River Loop Road). Turn right at the first stop sign; it will still be named Wilson River Loop Road after the turn. Go past the blinking red light at the Highway 6 intersection and continue up a hill. Turn left at the stop sign onto Third Street. Services: Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Foster Home Placement Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Nursing Facility Referrals Wellness Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Wellness Programs * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK OFFICE
